metadata.title: The Art of Obsession: 3 Dark Psychology Hacks
metadata.tags: dark psychology, obsession, manipulation, human behavior, loop

script_segments.text: Do not use this on someone you love.
script_segments.visual_keywords: intense human eye staring directly at camera, dark moody lighting, cinematic pupil dilation
flickering old lightbulb in dark room, skull silhouette, caution tape in shadows

script_segments.text: Here are three dark psychology hacks to make anyone obsessed with you. Number one: The Rollercoaster Effect.
script_segments.visual_keywords: glowing phone screen in dark room, notification light reflection on face, suspenseful atmosphere

script_segments.text: Stop being consistent. Be warm one day, and cold the next. Anxiety creates addiction.
script_segments.visual_keywords: ice melting rapidly in slow motion, fire turning into cold smoke, blue and red high contrast lighting

script_segments.text: Number two: The Zeigarnik Effect. Never finish your validation.
script_segments.visual_keywords: lonely silhouette standing under streetlamp in fog, mystery person in shadows, film noir aesthetic

script_segments.text: Give them a compliment, but don't tell them why. Leave their brain searching for the answer.
script_segments.visual_keywords: close up of lips whispering into an ear, dark blurry background, secretive movement
spinning top on a dark table, endless spiral staircase from above, maze blueprint

script_segments.text: Number three: Strategic Absence. People do not value what is always there.
script_segments.visual_keywords: empty chair in dimly lit room, dust motes in single light beam, abandoned mansion interior

script_segments.text: If you want to be missed, you must first leave. Your absence is your power.
script_segments.visual_keywords: single chess piece falling in slow motion on black board, king piece toppled, dramatic shadows

script_segments.text: You have the tools to control the game, but remember...
script_segments.visual_keywords: slow zoom into a pitch black void, hooded figure silhouette, dark smoke rising
